name: psychological-drivers-of-economic-decision-making-dataset
title: This dataset compiles global evidence on psychological factors that drive economic decision-making, spanning behavioral economics, cognitive psychology, and neuroeconomics research published from 1990 to 2025. It covers four core psychological variab
